q: Which law states that an object that is accelerating must have a net force acting on it?

The angle that the inclined track makes with the horizontal is called the angle of ___.
The horizontal component of the normal force in banking is expressed as ___.
The banking angle $\theta$ for a limiting speed $v$ is chosen such that $\tan \theta = ___$.
Which force acts normally to an aeroplane body?
